fields.description: Table fieldname on the Form Dialog target DocType (Frappe Table field).
fields.label: Parent Table Field

fields.description: Child DocType referenced by the Table field options.
fields.label: Child DocType

fields.description: Tab title in the panel Form Dialog.
fields.label: Tab Label

fields.description: JSON: parent_fieldname, child_doctype, label, optional fields[] (frozen meta), optional capture_error.
fields.label: Tab render JSON

fields.description: JSON array: [{fieldname, show, editable, optional sort_rank, sort_dir asc|desc}, …] column config for the inline grid.
fields.label: Portal field config

fields.description: When set, the related tab shows an X delete button per row and an Add row button. New rows auto-link to the root document via Link Field.
fields.label: Allow Add / Remove Rows

fields.description: Implicit IF condition evaluated against the root document. Empty = always editable. When true, editing is disabled. Example: status = 'Closed' OR docstatus = 1
fields.label: Edit Disabled When (SQL)

fields.description: JSON array of portal action buttons: [{action_id, label, method, roles, confirm, hide_if, params:[{arg, source, field, value, fieldtype, options, reqd}]}].
fields.label: Portal Actions
